name: Tsuma
text:
Eminent. (This province starts the game faceup and cannot be turned facedown. It cannot be a stronghold province.)
Each character played from this province enters play honored.

name: Silent Ones Monastery
text:
Eminent. (This province starts the game faceup and cannot be turned facedown. It cannot be a stronghold province.)
Each opponent cannot gain more than 2 honor each phase.

name: Courteous Greeting
text: Action: During a conflict at an [earth] province, choose an attacking character and a defending character – bow those characters.

name: Blatant Swindler
text:
Seeker role only.
Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, give your opponent 1 honor. That player chooses a participating character they control – move that character home.

name: Third Whisker Sneak
text:
Immune to Shadowlands and Mahō card effects.
Reaction: After this character wins an unopposed conflict – search the top X cards of your conflict deck for a card and add it to your hand. X is equal to the number of unbroken provinces you control. Shuffle.

name: Asahina Augur
text:
You may look at facedown cards in your provinces.
Action: Choose a card in your provinces – discard that card. (Limit 3 times per round.)

name: Shrewd Investigator
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating – look at X random cards in your opponent's hand. X is equal to the number of facedown provinces you control.

name: Kitsuki Chiari
text:
No Poison attachments.
Reaction: After a province you control is revealed, name a card – reveal 4 random cards in your opponent's hand and discard each copy of the named card revealed this way.

name: Master Tactician
text: During conflicts in which this character is participating, if there is a Battlefield in play, you may look at and play the top card of your conflict deck as if it were in your hand. You cannot play more than 3 cards per round in this way.

name: Student of the Tao
text:
Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province faceup.)
Action: During a conflict at a [void] province, choose a character you do not control – move that character home.

name: Cursecatcher
text:
Seeker role only.
Interrupt: When the effects of a province's triggered ability would initiate, if that province has any facedown cards in it – cancel those effects.

name: Scholar of Old Rempet
text:
Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province faceup.)
Action: During a conflict, lose 1 honor. Choose a non-unique character – that character is immune to events until the end of the conflict.

name: Lost Papers
text:
Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province faceup.)
Reaction: After this card is revealed in a province, choose a character with the most fate on it among characters in play – bow that character.

name: Return From Shadows
text: Reaction: After you win a conflict unopposed, choose a province the defending player controls – put a dishonored status token on it and reveal it, if able. While a province has a dishonored status token, treat its printed text box as if it were blank (except for Traits). (Max 1 per conflict.)

name: The Wealth of the Crane
text:
Reduce the cost to play this card by 1 for each faceup province you control.
Action: Look at the top 10 cards of your dynasty deck. Put 1 of those cards into each of your non-stronghold provinces faceup. Shuffle. (Max 1 per phase.)

name: Mantra of Void
text: Reaction: After an opponent declares a [void] conflict, choose a Monk character or a character with a Monk attachment – until the end of the conflict, reduce the cost to play attachments on that character by 1. Draw 1 card.

name: Makeshift War Camp
text:
Attach to an unbroken province.
Limit 1 Battlefield attachment per province.
During conflicts at attached province, each participating character you control gets +2 [mil].

name: Shori
text:
Attach to a unique  character.
Ancestral. Restricted.
If attached character has the Champion trait, it gains "You may declare an additional [mil] conflict each conflict phase."

name: Studious
text:
Attach to a Scholar character.
Attached character gains sincerity and: "Reaction: After this character wins a conflict – draw 1 card."

name: Study the Natural World
text: Action: During a conflict in which you control an attacking Scholar character – the contested ring gains each of the attacked province's elements until the end of the conflict. If you win the conflict, you may resolve each of the contested ring's effects.

name: Way With Words
text:
Water role only.
Attached character gains: "Reaction: After this character wins a [pol] conflict – take 1 honor from your opponent."

name: Hunting Falcon
text: Reaction: After this attachment enters play, choose a facedown province – look at that province.
